feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Dynamic Duo
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,001Chapters: 6/34Kudos: 224

Summary: Having been Batman for four years, Dick Grayson still hasn't gotten used to the cowl. Now, investigating a mass disappearance case, Dick meets a young street rat who's had friends tangled up in the same web. Jason Todd has all the traits Dick saw in himself when he first started—curious, shrewd, agile, and, most importantly, wanting to do good. Despite Dick's initial rejection of the boy, he starts to think that a long-term partnership isn't a bad idea. Perhaps four years have been long enough time for the current stasis. Perhaps, he thinks, it's time for his own Robin.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Afterglow
entry.summary:
Author: HawthorneWren

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,744Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 16

Summary: On the eve of a Wayne family wedding, the family celebrates love, friendship, and happily-ever-afters. While Tim and Damian prepare to begin their forever, old desires and old wounds resurface for Jason and Dick, forcing them to reexamine a love story they thought had ended years ago.

entry.title: The Stray
entry.summary:
Author: Rustycrunch

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,098Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Gotham does not forgive, and it does not forget. Neither does Samira Jimenez. When her father, a district attorney who dared to believe in a reformed city, is murdered, Samira is left with nothing but grief, a coin she cannot place, and a dangerous name whispered between criminals in the dark: Red Hood. Trained in the shadows by a mentor who showed her what Gotham was really made of, Samira learned that trust often came with a cost. Her pain had no room in these dark streets. And finding out the truth of her father's murder could lead her down a path that she'd spent her life fighting against. But Gotham's truths are never simple, and the man she has been hunting is not the killer she imagined. In a city where every light casts a longer shadow, Samira must decide what justice really means and how much of herself she is willing to lose to find it.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: the faust paradox
entry.summary:
Author: albertacanuck

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,087Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 30

entry.title: Like a House Afire
entry.summary:
Author: mynameisjessejk

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,167Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 119

Summary: This was not exactly what Bruce wanted when he suggested a Malone collaboration to prevent the Two-Facers from blowing up the entire leadership of the Irish Mob, but he probably should've expected it once Jason and Dick got involved. It is the perfect opportunity to introduce Steph to the Malones' world, though.

entry.title: bottoms up (let's forget tonight)
entry.summary:
Author: 002yb

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,503Chapters: 13/14Kudos: 618

Summary: Life has a funny way of screwing people and Jason has always looked best fucked over. It’s why it isn’t all that surprising that he wakes up from a blackout stupor to the staggering realization that he’s slept with his not-quite-brother and crush-for-forever. He expects it to be a big deal. It's not.

entry.title: Decadent Elegy on the Rusted Edge
entry.summary:
Author: Lucerne3149D

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,328Chapters: 4/10Kudos: 49

Summary: Dick Grayson once believed that hard work alone could change his fate. By day, he is a top student in the criminal justice program at community college; by night, he wipes down the bar at a rundown tavern on the edge of the city just to survive. Heavy debt is slowly grinding away his pride.Until Jason Todd appears.The cold, arrogant, and wildly wealthy heir uses two thousand dollars to buy one night with him. That night, money and desire collide in raw, naked heat.From cold transactions to fierce confrontations, then to gradually uncontrollable possession and redemption — the two become entangled again and again on the edge.They both thought they could control the game, but they never expected that a decadent elegy of class, desire, and downfall had already begun to play.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
